title: fix(polly): route to kimi-k2.6 instead of glm
author: Circuit-Overtime

gist.headline: Polly prefers Kimi
gist.blurb: Our GitHub PR assistant bot was having a slight existential crisis with GLM rejecting its tool calls. We've swapped its brain over to Kimi-k2.6, which is much more accommodating of complex payloads.
gist.summary: Switched the internal PR assistant workflow's default model from GLM to Kimi-k2.6 to fix API validation errors.
gist.impact: The Polly GitHub Actions bot can now reliably execute multi-step tool calls without crashing.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a mechanic, fixing a server or robot by swapping out a component, representing the model swap from GLM to Kimi.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny mechanic's tool belt, happily swapping a glowing lime green (#ecf874) computer chip into a retro server rack. Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
